name: Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 large can peeled tomatoes including the juice they were packed in (organic summer ones or winter canned ones)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes in a Cuisinart or other food processor and pour into a large bowl.
2. Chop the Anaheim pepper and pasilla pepper, then dump into the bowl.
3. Chop the Hungarian wax peppers, serrano peppers, garlic, cilantro, and green onions coarsely by hand and add to the bowl.
4. Add 2 tablespoons of balsamic vinegar and 1 teaspoon of cumin to the mixture.
5. Stir everything together and transfer the salsa into peanut-butter jars for storage in the refrigerator.
